name: Can I settle my whole occupational illness case at once in West Jordan?

mainEntity.name: Can I settle my whole occupational illness case at once in West Jordan?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, lump-sum settlements approved by Labor Commission for full resolution.[9] Covers future medicals, disability if all parties agree.[9] Key factors: independent medical exam, fair value calculation. Negotiate carefully; ensures finality but waives future claims. Common for permanent cases.
